series_metadata.series_title: Equal Employment Opportunity New Hire Form
series_metadata.series_description: Voluntary form completed by new hires containing demographics such as name, position hired for, race, gender, disability status, military status, and where they heard about the position opening. Information submitted to DAS for EEO-4 requirements and used by Department of Justice.
